channel.title: Nicklas Jarnesjö
channel.description: Writing about web development, side projects and things I learn along the way

item.title: Why and how I built a Swedish growing guide
item.description:
A market gardening course, soil pH values and wanting to understand what my wife actually does all day. That is how Odlingsguiden started.

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Moving from Next.js to Astro
item.description:
Ditched Next.js and Docker for Astro. Static files, no fuss and no more headaches.

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Resize images through unix terminal
item.description:
A small script to resize and shrink size of images through unix terminal

item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Simple cache busting for HTML project
item.description:
Simple solution to cache busting HTML projects.

item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Convert image format through unix terminal
item.description:
A small script to convert images from for example jpg to webp through unix terminal

item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Get `next export` working
item.description:
It seems that Next.js just added export with no intention to work at all, but you can make it work

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Developing GitHub Actions locally
item.description:
Mostly a note to my self how to develop GitHub Actions locally and don't have to push to GitHub to evaluate it

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Prisma challenges with Next.js in AWS Amplify
item.description:
Trying to learn AWS and used AWS Amplify to deploy Next.js with Prisma. Wasn't a straight forward experience and here some of the findings and errors we stumble upon and how we fixed it.

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: No .next directory after Docker build in GitHub Actions
item.description:
Got a very strange run time error after Docker build and deploy in GitHub Action. Docker stoped with no .next directory and one day later I found the solution 😅

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: jarnesjo.com goes public/open source
item.description:
I have decided to make jarnesjo.com public/open source after many thought and doubts. But I have to because it's scary I need to come over my imposter syndrome

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Deploying Next.js with Docker and Github actions to Digital Ocean
item.description:
Take another take to deploy Next.js outside Vercel-universe and deploying this blog with Docker through GitHub Actions to Digital Ocean

item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: GitHub Actions config for Gatsby JS site deploy to Digital Ocean
item.description:
Here I share my GitHub Action to build and deploy a Gatsby JS site to Digital Ocean droplet

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Get case sensitive renaming in git on macOS working
item.description:
Many times I have created a file and then find a case error in after adding it to Git. Now I find a working solution without delete commit -> add commit

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Format currency and units with locale in js with a breeze
item.description:
Note to myself post how format number with a breeze with Intl.Numberformat

item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Create dynamic sitemap for your Next.js blog (next-remote-mdx)
item.description:
Sitemap is a essential component for a site or blog and here I explain how to create one together withe Next.js and next-remote-mdx

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Hot reload with next-remote-mdx in Next.js
item.description:
Writing mdx-posts outside structure in Next.js won't give you natural hot reload so here my take and solution to it

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Blurred image placeholder for Next.js image (next/image)
item.description:
There is no native support for blurred image presentation in next/image, but many other benefits. So I explored and build blurred image presentation together with next/image

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Please use inputmode in forms
item.description:
One thing I really got annoyed about is when using form in the mobile and getting wrong keyboard for the input. This is a simple and native solution to fix it every developer should know about.

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö

item.title: Unbalance sound on Mac
item.description:
Got super weird experience in macOS where the sound drifted to either left or right (and stayed) when CPU was under heavy load.

Read full article →
item.author: Nicklas Jarnesjö
